jd:
测试 Leader 招聘。负责团队管理、质量保障、自动化测试、接口测试、白盒测试、性能测试、回归测试、缺陷跟踪、CI/CD、测试体系建设、版本交付。

Required skills (each repeated 5 times for TF top-K ranking):
Python Python Python Python Python — scripting and framework development.
Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest — interface automation framework.
MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL — query and data validation.
Linux Linux Linux Linux Linux — environment and shell.
Git Git Git Git Git — version control.
JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA — bug tracking and agile boards.

需要熟悉自动化测试、接口测试、白盒测试、Web测试、APP测试、敏捷测试、回归测试、测试体系、测试用例、测试计划、缺陷跟踪、报告输出、CI/CD、Jenkins、Git、JIRA 等工具。5+ years QA, 2+ years leadership required.
